data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Reduces decision time by simplifying available choices.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined navigation with concise menu options.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes button sizes and placements for easier access.
data.technical_spec: Larger clickable areas for critical actions.

data.title: Jakob’s Law of Internet User Experience
data.description: Adheres to common web practices for intuitive experience.
data.technical_spec: Consistent UI for expected user behavior.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits information presentation to avoid overload.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.technical_spec: Visual hierarchy to guide user actions.
